steps.title: Use similar triangles
steps.content: Because $LM$ is parallel to $PQ$, triangles $LMR$ and $PQR$ are similar.

steps.title: Find the scale factor
steps.content:
The corresponding side lengths along $MP$ are $MR=8$ and $RP=14$, so the linear scale factor is
$$
\frac{14}{8}=\frac{7}{4}
$$

steps.title: Scale the area
steps.content: Areas scale by the square of the linear factor: $$ 36(\frac{7}{4})^2 $$ $$ 36\cdot\frac{49}{16}=\frac{441}{4} $$ The answer is D.
